# Final Release Summary Template

Purpose: capture final release closeout evidence once rollout is complete.

```text
Artifact Type: final_release_summary
Release ID:
Version/Tag:
Commit Range:
Rollout ID:
Deployment Window Start (UTC):
Deployment Window End (UTC):
Owner:
Final Approver:

Completion Summary:
- Rollout stages completed:
- Final rollout evidence entry path:
- Freeze checklist path:
- WS21 rollback drill log path:
- Known issues:
- Post-release follow-up items:

Validation Evidence:
- Typecheck command/result:
- Targeted tests command/result:
- Deterministic governance checks command/result:

Outcome:
- Summary status (released/blocked/rolled_back):
- Final decision timestamp (UTC):
- Release notes reference:
```
